ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the graph processing tool being evaluated */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset used in testing */,
  "t_load" REAL /* Time taken to load the dataset (in seconds) */,
  "m_graph" INTEGER /* Memory usage during graph processing (in bytes) */,
  "t_first" REAL /* Time taken for the first operation (in seconds) */,
  "t_rest" REAL /* Time taken for subsequent operations (in seconds) */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the benchmark run */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used */,
  "tool_version" TEXT /* Version of the tool used in the benchmark */,
  "environment_details" TEXT /* Details about the environment where the benchmark was conducted */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance data was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES tools ("tool_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES benchmark_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tools" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tool */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the graph processing tool */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tool's capabilities */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the tool */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the tool's source code repository */,
  "license" TEXT /* License type of the tool */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the tool was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data scientist, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark run */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tool used in this run */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who initiated the run */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date when the benchmark was conducted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benchmark run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the benchmark run (e.g., completed, in progress, failed) */,
  "environment_details" TEXT /* Details about the environment where the benchmark was conducted */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_runs_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES tools ("tool_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_runs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_runs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the benchmark run this result belongs to */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric associated with this result */,
  "comparison" TEXT /* Description of the comparison (e.g., 'faster than', 'slower than') */,
  "tool_version" TEXT /* Version of the tool used in the benchmark */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmark_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with this role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the role was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "data_type" INTEGER /* Type of data (e.g., graph, text) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the dataset was updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., internal, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_type FOREIGN KEY ("data_type") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data type was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the data type was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report detailing the analysis */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "tool_version" TEXT /* Version of the tool used in the report */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used in the report */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tool used in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES tools ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparison_metrics" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., load time, memory usage) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the metric measures */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comparison metric was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the comparison metric was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., create report, run benchmark) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
